call_chain.name: SearchWorker::search
call_chain.note: Entry point. Selects search strategy (stdin, preprocessor, decompress, or direct path) and delegates.

call_chain.name: SearchWorker::search_reader
call_chain.note: Resolves PatternMatcher variant, then calls free fn search_reader.

call_chain.name: search_reader (free fn)
call_chain.note: Matches on Printer<W> enum; for each arm calls p.sink_with_path() to instantiate StandardSink / SummarySink / JSONSink, then forwards to Searcher::search_reader.

call_chain.name: Searcher::search_reader
call_chain.note: Core searcher; drives Sink callbacks (matched, context, finish).

change_impact_map.change: NEW FILE. Define CSV<W> printer struct, CSVSink<'p,'s,M,W> struct, impl CSV<W> with sink/sink_with_path methods, and impl Sink for CSVSink.
Add `mod csv;` module declaration and re-export `pub use csv::{CSV, CSVSink}`.
Add `CSV(grep::printer::CSV<W>)` variant to the Printer<W> enum.
Add `Printer::CSV(ref mut p) => p.get_mut()` arm to Printer::get_mut.
Add Printer::CSV match arm in free fn search_path, instantiating CSVSink and calling searcher.search_path.
Add Printer::CSV match arm in free fn search_reader, instantiating CSVSink and calling searcher.search_reader.
Extend --output-format / -o flag to accept 'csv' as a valid value.
Parse the csv format value and construct Printer::CSV(...) when building the SearchWorker.
